allow: Bash(awk 'BEGIN{IGNORECASE=1} { lower=tolower\($0\); base=tolower\($0\); n=split\($0,parts,"/"\); fname=parts[n]; if \(lower ~ /\\/anim/ || lower ~ /\\/animation/ || lower ~ /locomotion/ || lower ~ /lean/ || lower ~ /crouch/ || fname ~ /^as_/ || fname ~ /^abp_/ || fname ~ /^bs_/ || fname ~ /^am_/ || fname ~ /animmontage/ || fname ~ /animsequence/\) print $0 }')

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{IGNORECASE=1} { lower=tolower\($0\); n=split\($0,parts,"/"\); fname=parts[n]; lf=tolower\(fname\); if \(lower ~ /\\/anim/ || lower ~ /locomotion/ || lower ~ /lean/ || lower ~ /crouch/ || lf ~ /^as_/ || lf ~ /^abp_/ || lf ~ /^bs_/ || lf ~ /^am_/ || lf ~ /anim/ || lf ~ /montage/\) print $0 }')
